parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims are highly inconsistent and contradictory. He first claims to have robbed Mike and not seen a Seer, then later claims to have robbed James and not seen a Drunk, contradicting both Mike's and James's claims. He also admits to 'stirring the pot,' which is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to create confusion. Both James and Mike ultimately identify Justin as the Werewolf.
